name: Lexington Golf & Country Club
description: Lexington Golf & Country Club is a place to play pickleball in Lexington, VA. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The courts can be reserved. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.

name: W&L Outdoor tennis courts
description: 6 tennis courts, 4 with pickle ball lines but if you want nets especially for pickleball then you will need to bring your own net. You can use chalk because it washes away in the rain. There is NO kitchen line.
open_play_schedule: Can get busy during certain times especially M-F when student are around.
